'''Flangth-2-Go''' was a [[fast food]] chain that served [[flangth]]. It was the second-largest fast food chain in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], following the [[Tagge Restaurant Association/Legends|Tagge Restaurant Association's]] popular [[Biscuit Baron]] chain. Flangth-2-Go was owned by the [[Arcon Multinode Agricorp]].<ref name="HSCS" />

Flangth-2-Go was the sponsor for [[Jatz/Legends|Jatz]] musician [[Fitz Roi]]'s [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]]-wide [[Summerside Tour]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="GNN4">{{JournalCite|4|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref> They briefly considered revoking sponsorship when Roi appeared onstage in [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] garb in [[New Calamar]], [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]], but relented. When, a month later, Roi used his antique [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrowers]] to shoot numerous historical artistic artifacts in the [[Teirra Parko]]'s [[Crystal Room]] on [[Rimma]], Flangth-2-Go again strongly considered pulling their sponsorship.<ref name="GNN3">{{JournalCite|3|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref> They ultimately did choose to pull support for his tour, bringing it to an end and freeing Roi to perform at the [[Priole Danna Festival]] on [[Lamuir IV]].<ref name="GNN4" />
